goal: 实现 Agent Capsule 图片共享支持

summary.title: 实现 Agent Capsule 图片共享支持
summary.what: 为 Agent Capsule 增加图片资产支持：导出时识别 Codex session 里的 input_image、local_images 和 <image path=...>，把可读本地图片打包进 capsule 并输出图片摘要；导入时把图片写入目标 CODEX_HOME 下的 agent-capsule-assets/<new-thread-id>/images 并重写 session 里的本地图片路径；分享预览支持纯图片消息、图片网格和图片省略状态，同时调大 Worker 默认上传/preview 限额。同步补充中英文 README 和生成的 AGENT_README 图片说明。
summary.why: 用户希望先支持图片分享，使网页端能展示用户上传图片，并且导入到别人 Codex UI 后图片路径和上下文仍可继续使用。
summary.user_goal: 实现 Agent Capsule 图片共享支持

decisions.chose: 在 capsule 中新增可选 codex/assets/images.json 和 codex/assets/images/<sha256>.<ext>，旧 capsule 没有该清单时继续按原逻辑导入。
decisions.rationale: 可选资产清单保持向后兼容，同时让接收方能校验图片 sha256、MIME、大小和源路径。

decisions.chose: 将图片写到 $CODEX_HOME/agent-capsule-assets/<new-thread-id>/images/，并用新路径重写 local_images 和文本里的图片路径。
decisions.rationale: 路径跟新 thread id 绑定，避免覆盖源机器路径，也便于 Codex UI 和后续 agent 在目标机器读取图片。

decisions.point: 网页 preview 图片来源
decisions.chose: 优先使用 input_image.image_url 里的 data URL；只有没有内嵌图片时才用打包的本地图片资产作为 fallback。
decisions.rationale: Codex 原生消息里 data URL 是最直接的展示信号，避免同一张图片因为 <image path> 和 input_image 同时存在而重复显示。

decisions.chose: Worker 默认限额调到 8MB blob、3MB manifest、2MB encrypted preview；preview 内部仍限制最多 12 张图片和约 1.5MB 图片 payload，超出时显示省略状态。
decisions.rationale: 小图分享可直接走链接，大图或多图仍通过 fallback zip 或 BYO S3/R2 承载，避免匿名 Worker 被超大 payload 拖垮。

decisions.chose: README 明确图片和截图会进入 capsule，secret scan 只扫 session 文本，不 OCR 或扫描图片像素。
decisions.rationale: 图片可能包含敏感信息，必须让用户在分享前知道 CLI 不会自动识别图片里的 secret。

rejected.alternative: 把所有非图片文件也纳入第一版资产迁移
rejected.reason: 本轮目标是先支持图片；普通文件需要额外 MIME、大小、路径和 UI 语义设计。

rejected.alternative: 压缩或重编码图片来降低分享大小
rejected.reason: 第一版保持原始图片内容和 sha256 可校验，靠 preview 限制与 zip/BYO fallback 管控体积。

review_notes: 按用户要求直接收口到 main 并 push；提交在最新 origin/main 18751c4 之上完成 rebase，保留已合入的 README 隐私文档和 Worker 短 share id 改动。
验证：在 deploy/cloudflare-worker 下 npm test 通过，12 个 Worker 测试全部通过。
验证：在 deploy/cloudflare-worker 下 npm run check 通过。
验证：git diff --check origin/main..HEAD 通过。
未运行 Go make test，遵守本仓库约束。

architectural_claims: Capsule zip files may now include optional image assets under codex/assets while preserving compatibility with older capsules.
Local image paths referenced by imported sessions are rewritten to target-side CODEX_HOME asset paths tied to the new imported thread id.
Browser preview renders images only from decrypted preview payload data URLs and never fetches arbitrary local source paths.
Worker share limits are larger by default but still bounded; large capsules continue to rely on fallback zip or BYO storage.
behavioral_changes: capsule export/share now reports an images summary with embedded, copied, missing, unsupported, byte, and warning counts.
capsule inspect reports image summary for capsules with image assets or embedded input_image entries.
capsule import dry-run lists planned image asset writes; --execute writes images before writing the rewritten session.
Share preview keeps pure image messages and renders image galleries with omitted-image placeholders when soft limits are exceeded.
Generated AGENT_README.md tells receiving agents to inspect codex/assets/images.json when present.

data_model_changes.name: codex/assets/images.json
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Optional file; old capsules omit it and still load.

data_model_changes.name: codex/assets/images/<sha256>.<ext>
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Only present when local image assets are readable and supported.

data_model_changes.name: agent-capsule-assets/<new-thread-id>/images
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Created only during image-bearing imports with --execute.

security_implications: Capsules can now contain binary image/screenshot content in addition to session text.
Secret scan still covers session text only; README documents that image pixels are not scanned or OCRed.
Image assets are included in encrypted share blobs when link sharing is used; preview payload includes bounded data URLs only after browser-side decryption.
Import writes image files inside CODEX_HOME-scoped agent-capsule-assets instead of source-machine paths.
migration_notes: No migration required for existing capsules or Worker shares.
Self-hosted Worker deployments should copy the updated wrangler.toml.example limits if they want the new 8MB/3MB/2MB defaults.
